urea.name: Urea
urea.use: Boosts leaf and stem growth. Best applied in split doses.
urea.when_to_apply: At sowing and 30 days after sowing
urea.precaution: Do not apply before heavy rain. Avoid contact with seeds.

dap.name: DAP (Di-Ammonium Phosphate)
dap.use: Root development and early growth stage nutrition.
dap.when_to_apply: At sowing time, mixed with soil
dap.precaution: Store in dry place. Do not mix with urea directly.

mop.name: MOP (Muriate of Potash)
mop.use: Improves grain quality, disease resistance and water regulation.
mop.precaution: Avoid use in saline soils. Keep away from moisture.

ssp.name: SSP (Single Super Phosphate)
ssp.use: Soil conditioning, phosphorus and sulphur supply.
ssp.precaution: Do not store near acidic materials. Keep dry.

zinc_sulphate.name: Zinc Sulphate
zinc_sulphate.use: Corrects zinc deficiency which is common in UP soils.
zinc_sulphate.when_to_apply: At sowing or as foliar spray
zinc_sulphate.precaution: Do not mix with phosphatic fertilizers directly.

npk_12_32_16.name: NPK 12:32:16
npk_12_32_16.use: Balanced nutrition covering all major growth stages.
npk_12_32_16.when_to_apply: At sowing time as basal dose
npk_12_32_16.precaution: Store in cool dry place. Use within expiry date.
